title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell did you do to my body?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though the move has the unfortunate downside of diminishing your curves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it really gives you the most beautiful skin. Frankly, I'm envious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In exchange, your fighting power is half of what it used to be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should give up on trying to collect my key.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That girl turned into a giant!? So she was a fruit user too!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the ace up your sleeve was your 20an transfer- nation?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Isn't it a bit Reindeer like...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And there's no mistaking that hat...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
